public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness.
appearance: Veyn Mistglass usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their tax witness status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Shirsh, that reads as someone investigative, magically literate, and discreet, balancing inquiry with regulation, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tax witness in and around House Shirsh, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Shirsh workable through the obligations of tax witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shirsh.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around House Shirsh, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of tax witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Veyn Mistglass needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to House Shirsh.
Veyn Mistglass can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Veyn Mistglass communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Shirsh: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

first_impression: Veyn Mistglass presents as Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Shirsh, that reads as someone investigative, magically literate, and discreet, balancing inquiry with regulation, and the habits of a tax witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Tax Witness, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shirsh.
what_they_refuse: Veyn Mistglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Tax Witness too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Veyn Mistglass can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Veyn Mistglass adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Veyn Mistglass is Known locally through day-to-day work as tax witness. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Tax Witness.
